Careers at WestNet — Innovate, Impact, and Grow
Careers
Careers at WestNet

From wireless technology to heavy industries and humanitarian healthcare — join a team that's building the future across multiple continents.

About Us
Why WestNet

WestNet harnesses technology, innovation, and compassion to make a lasting global impact. From cutting-edge wireless solutions to our WestNet Heavy Industries division, we push boundaries. Our WestNet Humanitarian Services (WNHS) brings essential healthcare and humanitarian support to underserved communities worldwide.

We believe in growing together — personally and professionally. Our teams comprise bold thinkers, compassionate doers, and resolute problem-solvers. Join us to spark meaningful change.

Equal Opportunity: WestNet is an equal opportunity employer. We value diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

Open Positions
Current Opportunities
Director of Strategic Partnerships & Funding (WNHS)
Job ID: WNHS-DF-1001 · Posted: October 10, 2024 · Full-time · Global

Role: Develop and implement a global strategy to secure grants, build donor relationships, and forge alliances with philanthropic foundations and public-sector partners. Your efforts ensure sustained resources for WNHS's humanitarian mission.
